title: StackPicks · Lovable + Bolt — full apps from a prompt

rows.title: Type the idea — they build the app
rows.desc: Frontend + backend + DB + auth. React, Next.js, Supabase wired by default.

rows.title: Live preview, instant deploy
rows.desc: WebContainer (Bolt) or hosted preview (Lovable). Ship to prod in one click.

rows.title: Export to GitHub, edit in Cursor
rows.desc: Not a black box. You get real code. Use AI to scaffold, devs to polish.

install.body: No CLI. No setup. No local node version. Just open the site and describe what you want built.

rows.title: Lovable wins for
rows.desc: Full SaaS apps with auth + DB. Supabase-native. Best mid-complexity.

rows.title: Bolt wins for
rows.desc: Frontend-heavy demos. WebContainer = instant Node runtime. Faster iteration.

rows.title: Both lose for
rows.desc: Enterprise. Multi-service. Custom infra. Use Cursor + Claude there.

take.use_if: You're a non-dev with a SaaS idea. Or a dev who wants the boring 80% scaffolded. Both deliver a working app in <1 hour.
take.skip_if: You need exotic infra, queues, multi-region DB, or you're already deep in your own framework. AI builders sit on stacks they know.
take.sub: Lovable is free tier + $20/mo. Bolt is free tier + $20/mo.

more.body: v0.dev · Cursor · Replit Agent · Devin. Curated takes on each.
more.sub: 12 picks · free + paid · updated this week

caption_line: Full apps from a prompt — Lovable + Bolt. Frontend, backend, auth, DB. Free tier on both. Comment BUILDER for our full pick ↓
